description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix strategy to build and test on ubuntu-18.04 and macos-latest with different BLAS backends (Atlas, MKL, OpenBLAS). For each job, checkout the repository and submodules, download Ninja 1.9.0, install dependencies, and then configure and run CMake to build and test.
